title: Restart cockpit backend to apply repo-root path fix
description: Pull latest main (commit 69abc9e0) and restart the cockpit FastAPI backend (uvicorn, port 5555) so that _repo_root() now correctly resolves to the MIDE repo root via .git detection. After restart, verify GET /api/status/token-counters returns rows (not empty or error). Report: exit code of backend process, first 5 rows from token-counters endpoint response, and any Python tracebacks seen during startup.
